description: Standard UPI failure within T+5 window. Calm first query. Expect exact reversal date, no escalation.

turns.user: My payment of ₹1,850 to Zomato failed but the money was deducted. What should I expect?

sample_card.response: ₹1,850 debited to Zomato on 23 Jun. Reversal is expected by 1 Jul 2026 as per NPCI UPI rules.
sample_card.next_step: Reversal expected by 1 Jul 2026. Your bank is required to reverse this by 1 Jul 2026 under NPCI UPI rules — no action needed from your side.

description: UPI failure past T+5 deadline. Calm query. Expect escalation card with 4-business-hour SLA, no personal info request.

turns.user: I paid ₹2,340 to Swiggy via UPI on 18 June. It got debited but Swiggy never received it. What's happening?

sample_card.response: ₹2,340 debited to Swiggy on 18 Jun. The T+5 reversal deadline (25 Jun) has passed. A senior colleague has been notified and will reach out within 4 business hours.
sample_card.next_step: A senior colleague will contact you on your registered number. No action needed from you.

description: UPI failure exactly at T+5 today (Jun 26). Deadline day — escalation triggered. Expect 'deadline is today' + 4-hour outreach.

sample_card.next_step: A senior colleague will contact you within 4 business hours on your registered contact. No action needed.

description: High-value UPI failure (>₹50,000). Mandatory ESCALATION_RULE_AMOUNT regardless of T+5 window position.

description: Message over 500 characters. Input cap fires before any DB or API call. Instant error response.

turns.user: I am writing to express my deep concern and frustration regarding a UPI payment failure that occurred on the 23rd of June 2026. I attempted to send ₹1,850 to Zomato via UPI and while the amount was debited from my account the payment did not reach Zomato. I have been waiting for more than three days and have not received any reversal. I have contacted my bank and they have asked me to contact you. I also called the NPCI helpline and they said the reversal should have happened within T+5. I am extremely worried about this and request you to please look into this matter as soon as possible and ensure that my money is returned to me at the earliest convenience.

expected.sample_message: Your message is too long. Please keep it under 500 characters.

description: User provides a TXN ID that doesn't exist in the database (TXN999). No-transaction path fires, agent asks naturally for correct ID.

turns.user: My transaction TXN999 failed. Please check.

expected.sample_message: I couldn't find transaction TXN999 in your account. Could you double-check the TXN ID? It should start with TXN followed by numbers — you can find it in the app under Transactions.

description: Completely gibberish input. Classifier should return OUT_OF_SCOPE or UNCLEAR. Agent handles gracefully.

turns.user: asdfjkl qwerty zxcvbnm 12345

expected.sample_message: I'm not sure I understood that — I can help with UPI payment failures or Savings Pot withdrawals. Is that what you're dealing with?

description: SQL injection attempt in message. Treated as plain text. Classifier categorizes normally, no special handling needed.

expected.sample_message: It sounds like you have a UPI payment issue — was the amount debited from your account but not received by the merchant? Could you share more details?
